title: YouTube Shorts Ideas — Beluga vs Facts (Oct 2022)
html:
Brainstorm comparing two Shorts content angles: (1) Beluga / "Ahh Dingle" derpy-Discord meme videos — fast-paced, no human voice, but editing-heavy and needs a witty plotline; (2) random facts shorts — easy to produce, almost endless topics, but saturated and likely needs voiceover. Clear pros/cons table. Earliest YouTube content-strategy doc in the vault.

TL;DR

  • Yahir weighing two YouTube Shorts formats Oct 2022 — Beluga-style meme vs facts-channel grind.
  • Beluga model praised for snap-mind capture but flagged as editing-intensive.
  • Facts model marked as saturated + voiceover-dependent.
  • Companion seed for youtube tool later project.
  • "Goldfish brain" framing — explicit attention-economy content thesis.

youtube tool · creator search insights · grime · do things that dont scale
